allowed_patterns: green stock chart background.{0,120}(deprecated|do not use|archived|retired|forbidden|old)

calculation_notes: Facts require multi-source resolution across latest_update, compliance rules, platform specs, visual rules, asset manifest, and deprecated exclusions. Core scoring facts are traceable to task-visible env rules; minor layout deviations should be normal checklist deductions rather than hard-cap failures.
